description: Stores original person data (applicants and inventors) as submitted to patent offices, including unharmonized names and addresses before standardization processing.

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the harmonized person record in the tls206_person table.

columns.name: source_version
columns.description: Version identifier of the data source from which the person information was extracted.

columns.name: person_name_orig_lg
columns.description: Language code indicating the original language of the person's name.

columns.name: last_name
columns.description: Family name or surname extracted from the original person record.

columns.name: first_name
columns.description: Given name or first name extracted from the original person record.

columns.name: address_freeform
columns.description: Complete unstructured address as originally provided, without parsing into separate address components.

columns.name: address_2
columns.description: Second line of parsed address, typically containing additional location details.

columns.name: address_3
columns.description: Third line of parsed address, containing supplementary address information.

columns.name: address_5
columns.description: Fifth line of parsed address, containing further address information.

columns.name: street
columns.description: Street name and number extracted from the address.

columns.name: zip_code
columns.description: Postal code or ZIP code extracted from the address.

columns.name: state
columns.description: State, province, or region code extracted from the address.

columns.name: residence_ctry_code
columns.description: Two-letter country code representing the person's country of residence.

columns.name: role
columns.description: Role of the person in relation to the patent (e.g., applicant, inventor, representative).

columns.name: person_orig_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the original person record as submitted to the patent office.

columns.name: source
columns.description: Patent office or authority that provided the original person data.

columns.name: name_freeform
columns.description: Unstructured full name as originally provided, without parsing into separate name components.

columns.name: middle_name
columns.description: Middle name or initial extracted from the original person record.

columns.name: address_1
columns.description: First line of parsed address, typically containing street address or building information.

columns.name: address_4
columns.description: Fourth line of parsed address, containing additional address details.

columns.name: city
columns.description: City or municipality name extracted from the address.

columns.name: person_ctry_code
columns.description: Two-letter country code representing the person's country as stated in the patent document.
